标题: 2025 latest SALOMON platform Mary Jane sneakers with summer vibes. The thick sole design not only provides unique comfort but also elongates the legs effortlessly, giving you an instant leggy look. The simple style can easily match any outfit, making it versatile for any occasion. The classic retro design exudes a fashionable charm with every step, making it a trendy favorite. Perfect for petite girls, these shoes not only bring fashion but also confidence and elegance. Made with imported suede and original breathable mesh fabric, featuring original breathable mesh lining and ultra-light foam outsole. Sizes available: 35-40 (Custom size 40 cannot be exchanged or returned).

CDG x Salomon collaboration XT-6 series thick-soled Mary Jane casual sports shoes. Original purchase for development, continuing the brand's design DNA, blending minimalist design with practical technology. The collaboration shoes feature a simple black and white color scheme, with minimalist branding on the shoe body. Designed with Contagrip rubber thick soles and Pulsar Advanced sock-like contours replacing traditional laces, embellished with details like mesh, tear-resistant materials, waterproof strips, and nylon pull loops. Fabric: Original custom imported technical fabric. Lining: Original imported breathable mesh lining. Outsole: Original lightweight foam material. Sole thickness: 6.5CM. Sizes: #34-40 (Custom sizes 34 and 40 are non-returnable).
